title: Update architecture spec from decision
rationale: This decision indicates durable architecture guidance that should stay documented.
proposed_summary: Separating runner prepare/execute/collectResult behind adapters keeps CLI thin and enables future real Codex/Claude command integration without changing run orchestration.
proposed_patch_text:
## Constraints
- Separating runner prepare/execute/collectResult behind adapters keeps CLI thin and enables future real Codex/Claude command integration without changing run orchestration.
